meanings.definition: give up in the face of defeat of lacking hope; admit defeat
examples: In the second round, the challenger gave up

meanings.definition: withdraw from established society, especially because of disillusion with conventional values
examples: She hasn't heard from her brother in years--he dropped out after moving to California

meanings.definition: leave school or an educational program prematurely
examples: Many students drop out because they are not prepared for our challenging program
